WorkoutDescription:
AM SESSION — EASY RUN (fasted)
Distance: 8km | D+: 50m | Duration: 50min
Flat route along Arve or lakeside. HR strictly under 138. Conversational pace. Black coffee only before.

LUNCH SESSION — STRENGTH A (55min)
Ultra Goal: Balanced eccentric (descent protection) + explosive concentric (climbing power) for 5,000m of descent. Metabolic finisher for conditioning + calorie burn.

WARM-UP (5min):
Leg swings x15 each | Glute bridges x15 | Bodyweight squats x15 | Ankle circles x15 each

MAIN BLOCK — Heavy Eccentrics:
A1. Back Squat (eccentric) — 4x6 @ 60% 1RM — 4s descent, EXPLOSIVE drive up — Rest 90s
A2. Bulgarian Split Squat — 3x8 each leg — bodyweight or light DB — Rest 60s
B1. Weighted Step-ups (40cm box) — 3x10 each leg — light DB — Rest 60s
B2. Romanian Deadlift (DB) — 3x8 — slow descent, squeeze glutes at top — Rest 60s
C1. Explosive Step-ups (40cm box) — 3x6 each leg — drive up fast, controlled down — Rest 60s
C2. Calf Raises — 2x15 — controlled full ROM — Rest 30s

CORE CIRCUIT (x2, 30s rest between rounds):
Plank 45s | Dead Bug 10 each side | Pallof Press 10 each side

METABOLIC FINISHER — 8min EMOM (every minute on the minute):
Even minutes: 10 Kettlebell Swings (16-20kg) + 5 Box Jumps (or Step-ups)
Odd minutes: 10 Push-ups + 10 Air Squats

COOL-DOWN (3min):
Hip flexor stretch 45s each | Pigeon 45s each

AM SESSION — HILL REPEATS
Distance: 9km | D+: 300m | Duration: 65min
10min easy warm-up on flat (Z1). Main set: 6x4min on moderate incline (10-15% grade), effort at Z3 (HR 153-168). Walk/jog down recovery between reps (HR must drop below 140). 10min easy cool-down. Focus on short steps, upright posture, active arms.

TREADMILL ALTERNATIVE:
10min warm-up at 1% incline, easy pace.
6x4min at 10-12% gradient, 5.5-6.5 km/h — adjust speed to hit Z3 (HR 153-168).
2min standing rest between reps (HR must drop below 140 before next rep).
10min cool-down at 1%, easy pace.

LUNCH SESSION — MOBILITY (20min)
Hip openers: 90/90 stretch 60s each side | Pigeon pose 60s each
Ankle: Wall ankle stretch 45s each
Thoracic: Open book rotation 8 each side | Cat-cow x10
Foam roll: Quads 2min | Calves 2min | IT band 2min

AM SESSION — EASY RUN (fasted)
Distance: 7km | D+: 50m | Duration: 45min
Flat route. HR under 153. Easy effort, recovery from yesterday's hill repeats.

LUNCH SESSION — METABOLIC CIRCUIT (45min)
Ultra Goal: High-intensity conditioning + pole-specific upper body + calorie burn. Keep heart rate elevated throughout. This replaces traditional strength B.

WARM-UP (5min):
Arm circles x20 | Band pull-aparts x15 | Scapular push-ups x10 | 1min jump rope or jumping jacks

CIRCUIT A — Upper Body Power (4 rounds, 40s work / 20s rest per exercise):
1. Lat Pulldown (moderate weight, fast controlled reps)
2. Push-ups (or incline if needed)
3. Dumbbell Shoulder Press (standing, moderate weight)
4. Bent-over Rows (DB, moderate weight)
Rest 60s between rounds.

CIRCUIT B — Core + Explosive (3 rounds, 40s work / 20s rest):
1. Russian Twists (5kg plate)
2. Box Step-ups (alternating, fast, 40cm box)
3. Mountain Climbers
4. KB Swings (16kg)
Rest 45s between rounds.

CIRCUIT C — Burner (2 rounds, no rest between exercises):
30s Battle Ropes (or DB Thrusters if no ropes) → 30s Plank → 30s Air Squats → 30s Side Plank (switch halfway)
Rest 60s between rounds.

COOL-DOWN (5min):
Thoracic opener 60s | Lat stretch 45s each | Pec stretch 45s each | Child's pose 60s

SALÈVE CLIMB
Distance: 10km | D+: 800m | D-: 800m | Duration: 2h15
Route: Pas de l'Échelle → summit via main trail.
ASCENT (~1h30): Hike with poles at race effort. Target vertical speed: 400-450 m/h. HR in Z2 (138-153). Short steps, upright posture, rhythmic pole plants.
DESCENT (~45min): Easy controlled run down. Short quick steps on technical sections. No hard braking.

GYM ALTERNATIVE — STEP RUNNER (if Salève not possible):
Duration: 60-75min total (no descent = shorter session)

WARM-UP: 5min at low resistance, easy pace
MAIN BLOCK: 50-60min at Z2 (HR 138-153). Adjust resistance/speed to stay in zone.
COOL-DOWN: 5min easy stepping

RULES:
- Upright posture — do NOT lean on handrails (cheats the load, changes hiking posture)
- Light touch on rails for balance only
- Target step rate: 30-35 steps/min at moderate resistance
- If HR above 153, reduce speed

OPTIONAL COMBO: Since you're at the gym, add a 10min metabolic finisher after:
8min EMOM: Even min: 10 KB swings + 5 box jumps | Odd min: 10 push-ups + 10 air squats

What you lose vs Salève: descent practice, technical terrain, pole work.
What you gain: controlled vertical effort, gym combo opportunity.

REST DAY
Light 20min mobility/stretching only.
Hip flexors 60s each | Hamstrings 60s each | Calves 45s each | Thoracic rotation 8 each
Foam roll if needed. 10,000 steps walking. LOW calorie day.

KEY SESSION — SKI TOURING (replaces long mountain run)
D+: 1,000-1,200m | Duration: 3h30-4h | Descents: ski down

Ski touring is an excellent substitute — sustained climbing with poles at race effort, high calorie burn, altitude exposure.

ASCENT:
Steady skinning at Z2 (138-153). This IS your race-pace climbing practice.
Breathing rhythm: 3 steps in, 3 steps out. If HR above 153, slow down.
Target 3-4 ascents totaling 1,000-1,200m D+.

NUTRITION — FULL RACE PROTOCOL:
Practice fueling while skinning. C90 sachet every hour (80g carbs/h).
Water 500ml/h. Eat while moving, not just at transitions.
This is your fueling rehearsal — treat it exactly like a long run.

DESCENT:
Ski down. Enjoy it. Won't train running descent but that's fine for one session.

POST-SESSION:
Large recovery meal within 30min. HIGH calorie day.

Why this works: skinning at Z2 with poles for 3-4 hours is closer to race-day climbing than any flat long run. The altitude is a bonus.

Details: Downhill skiing + optional evening easy run 5km
WorkoutDescription:
DOWNHILL SKIING + OPTIONAL EVENING RUN

DAY SESSION — DOWNHILL SKIING:
Enjoy the skiing. This counts as active recovery — quad engagement on turns, fresh air, movement.
Stay hydrated. Eat well at lunch.

EVENING SESSION (optional, if legs feel OK):
Easy run 5km | D+: 30m | Duration: 30-40min
Flat route only. Z1 (HR under 138). Very easy shake-out.
If legs are heavy from skiing: SKIP IT. Walk 30min instead. No guilt.

LOW calorie day (unless skiing was very intense, then MODERATE).

AM SESSION — EASY RUN (fasted)
Distance: 9km | D+: 50m | Duration: 55min
Flat, easy. Monday weigh-in.

LUNCH SESSION — STRENGTH A (60min)
Ultra Goal: Heavy eccentric for descent protection + explosive concentric for climbing power. Increase load. Finisher increases in intensity.

WARM-UP (6min):
Leg swings x15 each | Glute bridges x15 | Bodyweight squats x15 | Walking lunges x10 each

MAIN BLOCK — Heavy Eccentrics:
A1. Back Squat (eccentric) — 5x5 @ 70% 1RM — 4s descent, EXPLOSIVE drive up — Rest 90s
A2. Weighted Step-ups (40cm box) — 3x10 each leg — moderate DB — Rest 60s
B1. Romanian Deadlift (DB) — 3x8 — controlled 3s descent — Rest 60s
B2. Bulgarian Split Squat — 3x8 each leg — DB in each hand — Rest 60s
C1. Explosive Step-ups (40cm box) — 3x8 each leg — drive up fast, step down controlled — Rest 60s
C2. Calf Raises — 2x15 — controlled full ROM — Rest 30s

CORE CIRCUIT (x2, 30s rest between rounds):
Plank 45s | Dead Bug 10 each side | Pallof Press 10 each side

METABOLIC FINISHER — 10min AMRAP (as many rounds as possible):
8 Kettlebell Swings (20kg) → 6 Goblet Squats (16kg) → 8 Push-ups → 200m Row
Log your rounds. Beat this number in Week 3.

COOL-DOWN (3min):
Hip flexor stretch 45s each | Quad stretch 45s each

AM SESSION — SALÈVE REPEATS
Distance: 14km | D+: 1,200m | D-: 1,200m | Duration: 2h30
REP 1: Hike up with poles (~600m D+, ~45min). Target 450 m/h. HR Z2. Run down (~20min).
Rest 5-10min. Refuel with gel.
REP 2: Same route, maintain vertical speed even though tired.

LUNCH SESSION — MOBILITY (20min)
Hip: 90/90 stretch 60s each | Pigeon 60s each
Ankle: Wall stretch 45s each
Foam roll: Quads 3min | Calves 2min | Glutes 2min
HIGH calorie day.

AM SESSION — EASY RUN (fasted)
Distance: 8km | D+: 50m | Duration: 50min
Recovery from Salève repeats.

LUNCH SESSION — METABOLIC CIRCUIT (45min)
Ultra Goal: Build on Week 1 circuit. Increase weights where possible. Same structure, harder effort.

WARM-UP (5min):
Arm circles x20 | Band pull-aparts x15 | Scapular push-ups x10 | 1min jump rope

CIRCUIT A — Upper Body Power (4 rounds, 40s work / 20s rest per exercise):
1. Lat Pulldown (increase weight from W1)
2. Push-ups (add weight vest or elevate feet if easy)
3. Dumbbell Shoulder Press (standing, increase weight)
4. Bent-over Rows (DB, increase weight)
Rest 60s between rounds.

CIRCUIT B — Core + Explosive (3 rounds, 40s work / 20s rest):
1. Russian Twists (8kg plate or heavier)
2. Box Step-ups (faster tempo, 40cm box)
3. Mountain Climbers (fast)
4. KB Swings (20kg)
Rest 45s between rounds.

CIRCUIT C — Burner (3 rounds this week, no rest between exercises):
30s Battle Ropes (or DB Thrusters) → 30s Plank → 30s Jump Squats (or Air Squats) → 30s Side Plank
Rest 60s between rounds.

COOL-DOWN (5min):
Thoracic opener 60s | Lat stretch 45s each | Child's pose 60s

TRAIL TEMPO
Distance: 11km | D+: 200m | Duration: 70min
15min warm-up (Z1). 3x10min at Z2-Z3 on rolling trails. 5min jog between. 10min cool-down.
Consistent effort on varied terrain.

REST DAY
Light 15min mobility. 10,000 steps walking. LOW calorie day.

Details: 28km / 1,500m D+ — mountain long run, poles, full nutrition practice
WorkoutDescription:
KEY SESSION — LONG MOUNTAIN RUN
Distance: 28km | D+: 1,500m | D-: 1,500m | Duration: 4h
Jura traverse or Salève extended. Poles. Full race nutrition: C90 every hour (80-90g carbs/h), water 500ml/h.
Walk ALL climbs. Target 450 m/h early, 400 m/h late. Run flats 8:30-9:00/km.
Practice aid station routine at halfway. HIGH calorie day.

Details: 10km / 600m D+ — back-to-back mountain hike with poles
WorkoutDescription:
BACK-TO-BACK SESSION
Distance: 10km | D+: 600m | D-: 600m | Duration: 1h30
Easy mountain hike with poles. NOT a run. Train on tired legs.
HR under 138. Practice eating while hiking. HIGH calorie day.

AM SESSION — EASY RUN (fasted)
Distance: 8km | D+: 50m | Duration: 50min
Monday weigh-in. Recovery from weekend.

LUNCH SESSION — STRENGTH A (60min)
Ultra Goal: Peak loading — heaviest squats + most explosive concentric work. Biggest finisher. After this week, strength tapers.

WARM-UP (6min):
Leg swings x15 each | Glute bridges x15 | Bodyweight squats x15 | Walking lunges x10 each

MAIN BLOCK — Peak Eccentrics:
A1. Back Squat (eccentric) — 4x6 @ 75-80% 1RM — 4s down, explosive up — Rest 2min
A2. Bulgarian Split Squat — 3x8 each leg — heavy DB — Rest 75s
B1. Romanian Deadlift (DB) — 3x8 — heavy, 3s descent — Rest 60s
B2. Weighted Step-ups (40cm box) — 3x10 each leg — moderate DB — Rest 60s
C1. Jump Squats — 3x8 — full depth, max height, soft landing — Rest 60s
C2. Calf Raises — 2x15 — controlled full ROM — Rest 30s

CORE CIRCUIT (x2, 30s rest between rounds):
Plank 45s | Dead Bug 10 each side | Pallof Press 10 each side

METABOLIC FINISHER — 10min AMRAP:
8 Kettlebell Swings (20-24kg) → 6 Goblet Squats (20kg) → 8 Push-ups → 200m Row
Beat last week's rounds.

COOL-DOWN (3min):
Hip flexor stretch 45s each | Pigeon 45s each | Quad stretch 45s each

AM SESSION — STEEP HILL REPEATS
Distance: 10km | D+: 500m | Duration: 75min
10min easy warm-up. Main set: 8x3min on STEEP incline (>15% grade). Hard hiking effort, Z3-Z4 (HR 153-183). Walk down recovery (HR below 140 before next rep). 10min cool-down jog.
Focus: Power hiking at high intensity — arms driving, poles planted aggressively, short powerful steps.

TREADMILL ALTERNATIVE:
10min warm-up at 1% incline.
8x3min at 15% gradient, 5.0-6.0 km/h — adjust speed to hit Z3-Z4 (HR 153-183).
90s standing rest between reps (HR must drop below 140).
10min cool-down at 1%.
Grip the front bar lightly for balance if needed at 15% — do NOT lean on it.

LUNCH SESSION — MOBILITY (25min)
Hip: 90/90 stretch 60s each | Pigeon 60s each | Hip circles 10 each
Ankle: Wall stretch 45s each | Calf raises on step 15 reps
Thoracic: Open book 8 each | Thread the needle 8 each
Foam roll: Quads 3min | Calves 2min | IT band 2min | Glutes 2min
HIGH calorie day.

AM SESSION — EASY RUN (fasted)
Distance: 7km | D+: 50m | Duration: 45min
Recovery between hard sessions.

LUNCH SESSION — METABOLIC CIRCUIT (50min)
Ultra Goal: Peak conditioning week. Maximum intensity. Longest circuits. Match the effort of your peak running week.

WARM-UP (5min):
Arm circles x20 | Band pull-aparts x15 | 1min jump rope | 30s high knees

CIRCUIT A — Upper Body Power (5 rounds, 40s work / 20s rest per exercise):
1. Lat Pulldown (heavy, controlled)
2. Push-ups (feet elevated or weighted)
3. Dumbbell Shoulder Press (standing, heavy)
4. Bent-over Rows (DB, heavy)
Rest 50s between rounds.

CIRCUIT B — Core + Explosive (4 rounds, 40s work / 20s rest):
1. Russian Twists (8-10kg)
2. Box Step-ups (fast, explosive)
3. Mountain Climbers (max speed)
4. KB Swings (20-24kg)
Rest 40s between rounds.

CIRCUIT C — Burner (3 rounds, no rest between exercises):
30s Battle Ropes → 30s Plank → 30s Jump Squats → 30s Side Plank
Rest 45s between rounds.

AMRAP FINISHER — 5min:
5 Burpees → 10 KB Swings → 15 Air Squats
As many rounds as possible. Log it.

COOL-DOWN (5min):
Thoracic opener 60s | Lat stretch 45s each

Details: 16km / 1,000m D+ — Salève full climb + traverse, poles
WorkoutDescription:
MOUNTAIN-SPECIFIC SESSION
Distance: 16km | D+: 1,000m | D-: 1,000m | Duration: 2h30
Salève full climb + ridge traverse. Poles. Target 450 m/h vertical speed.
HR in Z2. If above 153, slow down. No lunch session. HIGH calorie day.
Focus: Sustained climbing at race vertical speed

WorkoutDescription:
REST DAY
Light 15min mobility. Prep gear for 5 AM start tomorrow.
LOW calorie day. Bed by 9:00 PM.

Details: 37km / 2,000m D+ — KEY SESSION, 5:00 AM start, full race kit + nutrition
WorkoutDescription:
*** KEY SESSION OF THE PLAN ***
Distance: 37km | D+: 2,000m | D-: 2,000m | Duration: 5h-5h30
START: 5:00 AM

Full race kit, poles, headlamp, all nutrition.
C90 every hour (80-90g carbs/h), water 500-700ml/h, bar every 2h, salt caps every 45min.
Walk ALL climbs (450 m/h). Run flats 8:30-9:00/km. HR never above 153.
Log how you feel at hour 3, 4, 5. HIGH+ calorie day.
Focus: Race simulation — pacing, fueling, kit, early start

WorkoutDescription:
BACK-TO-BACK SESSION
Distance: 13km | D+: 700m | D-: 700m | Duration: 2h
Easy mountain on tired legs. Hike up with poles, walk/easy jog down.
HR under 138. Practice eating while hiking.
If destroyed: reduce to 1h30 / 10km / 500m D+. HIGH calorie day.

AM SESSION — EASY RUN (fasted)
Distance: 7km | D+: 50m | Duration: 45min
Monday weigh-in. Recover from peak weekend.

LUNCH SESSION — STRENGTH A (45min)
Ultra Goal: Maintenance — preserve both eccentric and concentric adaptations. Finisher stays moderate.

WARM-UP (5min):
Leg swings x15 each | Glute bridges x15 | Bodyweight squats x15

MAIN BLOCK — Maintenance:
A1. Back Squat (eccentric) — 3x6 @ 65% 1RM — 4s down, explosive up — Rest 90s
A2. Step-ups (40cm box) — 2x8 each leg — light DB — Rest 60s
B1. Romanian Deadlift (DB) — 2x8 — moderate — Rest 60s

CORE CIRCUIT (x2, 30s rest between rounds):
Plank 40s | Dead Bug 8 each side | Pallof Press 8 each side

METABOLIC FINISHER — 6min EMOM:
Even minutes: 8 Kettlebell Swings (16kg) + 5 Box Step-ups
Odd minutes: 8 Push-ups + 8 Air Squats

COOL-DOWN (3min):
Hip flexor stretch 45s each | Quad stretch 45s each

AM SESSION — MOUNTAIN TRAIL TEMPO
Distance: 12km | D+: 400m | Duration: 75min
15min warm-up. 4x8min at Z2-Z3 on undulating mountain trail. 4min jog between. 10min cool-down.

LUNCH SESSION — MOBILITY (20min)
Hip: 90/90 60s each | Pigeon 60s each
Ankle: Wall stretch 45s each
Foam roll: Quads 2min | Calves 2min | IT band 2min

AM SESSION — EASY RUN (fasted)
Distance: 6km | D+: 30m | Duration: 40min

LUNCH SESSION — METABOLIC CIRCUIT (35min)
*** LAST GYM SESSION OF THE PLAN ***
Ultra Goal: Final conditioning hit. Moderate volume, high intensity. Leave the gym feeling sharp, not destroyed.

WARM-UP (5min):
Arm circles x20 | Band pull-aparts x15 | 1min jump rope

CIRCUIT A — Upper Body (3 rounds, 40s work / 20s rest per exercise):
1. Lat Pulldown (moderate)
2. Push-ups
3. Shoulder Press (moderate)
4. Bent-over Rows (moderate)
Rest 60s between rounds.

CIRCUIT B — Core + Explosive (2 rounds, 40s work / 20s rest):
1. Russian Twists (5kg)
2. Box Step-ups (controlled)
3. Mountain Climbers
4. KB Swings (16kg)
Rest 45s between rounds.

FINISHER — 4min EMOM:
8 KB Swings + 5 Push-ups each minute

COOL-DOWN (5min):
Full body stretching. You're done with the gym. Trust the work.

REST DAY
Light 20min mobility. Prep ALL race gear for Saturday.
LOW calorie day. Bed by 9:00 PM.

SHAKEOUT + STRIDES
Distance: 5km | D+: 20m | Duration: 30min
20min easy jog. 4x20s strides (60s walk between). Activate legs for tomorrow.

Details: 40km / 2,300m D+ — DRESS REHEARSAL, 5:00 AM start, full race kit
WorkoutDescription:
*** DRESS REHEARSAL — RACE SIMULATION ***
Distance: 40km | D+: 2,300m | D-: 2,300m | Duration: 5h30-6h
START: 5:00 AM

Wake 3:00 AM. Pre-race meal at 3:15 (rice cakes + honey + banana + coffee).
Full race kit: same vest, shoes, socks, poles, layers, anti-chafe.
Exact race nutrition: C90 every hour, bar every 2h, salt caps every 45min, water 500-700ml/h.
Mock aid station at km 20: refill, eat salty food, leave in <5 min.
Walk ALL climbs (450 m/h early, 400 m/h after 3h). Flats 8:30-9:00/km. HR max 153.
LOG EVERYTHING: nutrition feel, chafing, shoe comfort, pole straps. HIGH+ calorie day.

EASY RECOVERY RUN
Distance: 7km | D+: 30m | Duration: 45min
Flat, very easy. Note any residual soreness.

Details: 6km / 30m D+ — flat, fasted. STOP CREATINE TODAY
WorkoutDescription:
AM SESSION — EASY RUN (fasted)
Distance: 6km | D+: 30m | Duration: 40min
Monday weigh-in.
*** STOP CREATINE TODAY — expect 1-2kg water weight drop over next 10 days. ***

LUNCH SESSION — LIGHT STRENGTH + MOBILITY (30min)
*** LAST STRENGTH SESSION ***

ACTIVATION (10min):
Bodyweight squats 2x15 | Glute bridges 2x12 | Calf raises 2x15

CORE (5min):
Plank 2x30s | Dead Bug 2x8 each

MOBILITY (15min):
Hip flexors 60s each | Pigeon 60s each | Hamstrings 45s each | Ankles 30s each
Foam roll: Quads 2min | Calves 2min

AM SESSION — HILL REPEATS (last quality session)
Distance: 8km | D+: 300m | Duration: 50min
10min easy warm-up. Main set: 5x3min at Z3 (HR 153-168) on moderate incline. Walk/jog recovery. 10min cool-down.
This is your LAST hard session. Run with confidence.

TREADMILL ALTERNATIVE:
10min warm-up at 1% incline.
5x3min at 12% gradient, 5.5-6.5 km/h — adjust speed to hit Z3 (HR 153-168).
90s standing rest between reps (HR below 140).
10min cool-down at 1%.

LUNCH SESSION — MOBILITY (20min)
Full lower body mobility + foam roll.

EASY RUN (fasted)
Distance: 5km | D+: 20m | Duration: 35min
Flat, very easy. LOW calorie day.

MOUNTAIN RUN
Distance: 10km | D+: 700m | D-: 700m | Duration: 1h30
Salève or local mountain. Hike up with poles, easy run down. HR Z1-Z2. HIGH calorie day.

REST DAY
Light 15min mobility. LOW calorie day.

Details: 20km / 1,100m D+ — LAST LONG RUN, test final race nutrition
WorkoutDescription:
LAST LONG RUN
Distance: 20km | D+: 1,100m | D-: 1,100m | Duration: 2h30-3h
Mountain. Poles. Final nutrition test — use exact race-day products.
Z1-Z2. Finish feeling like you could do 2 more hours. HIGH calorie day.

EASY RUN
Distance: 5km | D+: 20m | Duration: 30min
Flat, very easy. LOW calorie day.

AM SESSION — EASY RUN (fasted)
Distance: 5km | D+: 20m | Duration: 30min
Monday weigh-in. Trust the taper.

LUNCH SESSION — MOBILITY (20min)
Gentle stretching and foam roll. No strength.
Hip flexors 60s each | Hamstrings 45s each | Quads 45s each
Foam roll: full body light pass

SHORT QUALITY
Distance: 6km | D+: 50m | Duration: 35min
15min warm-up. 4x2min at Z3. 2min jog between. 10min cool-down. Feel snappy. LOW calorie day.

AM SESSION — EASY RUN
Distance: 4km | D+: 10m | Duration: 25min
Minimal.

LUNCH SESSION — LIGHT CORE (15min)
Planks 2x30s | Dead Bug 2x8 each | Glute Bridges 2x12
LOW calorie day.

EASY HIKE WITH POLES
Distance: 5km | D+: 350m | D-: 350m | Duration: 45min
Last mountain touch before race day. HR under 153. Visualize race day.

REST DAY
Light 15min mobility. LOW calorie day. Check mandatory gear list.

SHAKEOUT + STRIDES
Distance: 5km | D+: 20m | Duration: 30min
25min easy jog + 3x15s strides (60s walk between). Taper heaviness is normal.

EASY JOG OR REST
Distance: 3km | D+: 10m | Duration: 20min
Very easy jog or complete rest. LOW calorie day.

EASY JOG
Distance: 3km | D+: 10m | Duration: 20min
Very easy. Normal eating.

LIGHT MOBILITY + ACTIVATION
Clamshells 2x15 each | Banded walks 2x20 steps | Glute bridges 2x15
Hip openers 60s each | Ankle mobility 30s each
No running.

FINAL SHAKEOUT
Distance: 2km | D+: 0m | Duration: 15min
10min easy jog + 3x15s strides (60s walk between).
BEGIN CARB LOADING: 6-7g/kg = 570-665g carbs. White rice, pasta, bread, honey, jam, juice.

Details: FULL REST — J-2 heavy carb loading
WorkoutDescription:
FULL REST
HEAVY CARB LOADING: 8-10g/kg = 760-950g carbs.
Eat every 2-3h: white rice, pasta, bread, pancakes, honey, jam, juice, sports drinks.
Minimal fiber/fat. +1-2kg water = glycogen fuel. Bed by 9:30 PM.

Details: FULL REST — J-1, pack race bag, early bed
WorkoutDescription:
FULL REST
Big carb breakfast + big pasta lunch. Light dinner by 6 PM.
Pack race bag. Lay out clothes. Pin bib. Charge headlamp + watch.
Set 2 alarms for 3:00 AM. Magnesium at 8:30 PM. Bed by 9:00 PM.
You are ready.

Details: 76.9km / 5,000m D+ — Trail du Gypaète Les 3 Lacs — SUB-14H GOAL
WorkoutDescription:
*** RACE DAY ***
Distance: 76.9km | D+: 5,000m | Goal: Sub-14 hours

3:00 AM Wake | 3:15 AM Pre-race meal | 5:00 AM START

Flat: 8-9/km Z1-Z2 | Moderate climb: 12-15/km Z2 poles | Steep: 18-25/km Z2-Z3 poles
Easy descent: 7-8/km | Technical: 9-12/km

80-90g carbs/h. C90 every hour. Bar every 2h. Salt cap every 45min. Water 500-700ml/h.
Caffeine 100mg at hour 3, then every 3h.

Walk ALL climbs. Never exceed Z3. Start conservative. Aid stations <5 min. DO NOT SIT DOWN.

POST-RACE RECOVERY
No running. Walk only. Foam roll gently. Eat well. Compression socks. Celebrate.
Days 1-7: No running | Days 8-14: Light easy runs 3x/week | Week 3+: Normal running | Week 4+: 114K build

POST-RACE RECOVERY
No running. Walk 20-30min. Foam roll gently. Compression. Eat well — protein 1.8g/kg, carbs high.
Sleep 9h+. Celebrate the 77K — it was the perfect dress rehearsal.

Easy walk 30min flat.
LUNCH SESSION — MOBILITY (20min)
90/90 hips 60s/side | Pigeon 60s/side | Wall ankle stretch 45s/side
Open book rotation x8/side | Cat-cow x10
Foam roll: quads 2min | calves 2min | IT band 2min
Full rest. Gentle stretching 10min in evening. Monitor resting HR — should trend back to baseline by Sunday.

EASY SWIM 30min. Pull buoy ok. No flip-turn sprints. Pure circulation work.
Evening: foam roll quads + calves 10min.

Walk 45min, light hills ok.
LUNCH SESSION — MOBILITY (20min)
90/90 hips 60s/side | Pigeon 60s/side | Wall ankle stretch 45s/side
Open book rotation x8/side | Cat-cow x10

Rest. Review Gypaète data: what worked (nutrition, pacing — avg HR 122 was perfect) and what to improve (late-race descents, HR drifted to 170+).
That descent resistance is THE focus of this block.
Full rest.

FIRST RUN BACK — 30min flat, HR strictly <138. Walk breaks if HR drifts. Soft surface if possible.

Details: 109km / 5,400m D+ — Nice Côte d'Azur by UTMB — 17H GOAL
WorkoutDescription:
*** RACE DAY — NICE 100K — 26 SEPT 2026 ***
Distance: 109km | D+: 5,400m | Goal: 17 hours (≈6:15/effort-km)

PACING (Gypaète-proven — you ran 5:55/ekm there at avg HR 122, you have margin):
Climbs: 450-500 m/h, poles, Z2 max | Flats: 6:30-7:00/km Z1-Z2 | Descents: controlled, cadence 85+, save quads to km 109
First 30km (high Mercantour): deliberately SLOW — Z1-Z2 only, you should feel embarrassed by how easy it is.
Km 30-70: steady Z2 rhythm, aid stations <5min, NEVER sit.
Km 70-109: race starts here. Descents to the sea = where 17h is won. Trust the downhill repeats.

NUTRITION (validated at Gypaète): 80-90g carbs/h | C90 hourly | bar every 2h | salt cap every 45min | 500-700ml water/h, more in afternoon heat | caffeine 100mg at h3, then every 3h.

HEAT: afternoon coastal sections will be warm — ice/water on neck at every aid station from km 60.
NIGHT START: headlamp until ~7h30, manage it at first aid station.

Walk ALL climbs. NEVER exceed Z3. The Promenade is waiting.

POST-RACE
No running 7-10 days. Walk, swim, eat, sleep, celebrate on the Promenade.
Days 1-7: no running | Days 8-14: easy jogs 3x/week | Week 3+: normal running.
